title: watch_events SSE Event
description: Schema for a single Server-Sent Event (SSE) message delivered on GET /v1/projects/:project_id/events (or per-table watch endpoints like /open-items/events). Each SSE 'data:' line is a JSON object matching this schema.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number per project. Clients can use this to detect missed events and request a replay from a given seq.

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Shape depends on event_type; see per-table response schemas for the full record definitions.

emitted_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the daemon emitted this event.
